summary: Iteration 15 testing completed. All 15 backend API tests pass (100%). All frontend features verified. GitHub-based update system, health monitor refactoring (observer_metrics), and mDNS discovery enhancements all working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/updates/check returns configured=false when GITHUB_REPO not set
Backend: GET /api/updates/status returns current_version='1.0.0', github_repo='', and update_history array
Backend: GET /api/updates/history returns persisted history from DB
Backend: GET /api/updates/downloads returns empty assets list
Backend: POST /api/updates/prepare?target_version=2.0.0 creates backup and returns changelog, download_links, rollback_info, manual_steps
Backend: GET /api/health/detailed returns observer_metrics (not automation_metrics)
Backend: GET /api/discovery/agents returns agents, count, discovery_active, and stats object
Backend: GET /api/discovery/stats returns active_agents, paired_agents, scan_count, stale_timeout_seconds
Backend: POST /api/discovery/rescan triggers re-scan and returns stats with incremented scan_count
Backend: All endpoints require admin authentication (401 without token)
Frontend: System page renders Updates tab with version display (v1.0.0)
Frontend: System page has 'Auf Updates prüfen' button that triggers update check
Frontend: System page shows 'GitHub-Repository konfigurieren' message when GITHUB_REPO not set
Frontend: System page shows update history with prepare_update events
Frontend: System page tabs present: Updates, Backups, Logs, Details
Frontend: Discovery page renders stats cards (AKTIVE AGENTS, GEPAIRT, GESAMT ENTDECKT, SCANS)
Frontend: Discovery page has 'Neu scannen' button that triggers network scan
Frontend: Discovery page shows 'Netzwerk-Scan neu gestartet' toast on rescan
Frontend: Discovery page empty state shows 'Keine Agents im Netzwerk gefunden'
Frontend: Discovery page empty state has 'Netzwerk erneut scannen' button
critical_code_review_comments: ESLint warnings in System.js and Discovery.js about missing dependencies in useCallback/useEffect hooks - non-blocking but should be fixed for code quality
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15 features tested: 1) Enhanced GitHub-based update system at /api/updates/* endpoints - shows 'configured=false' since GITHUB_REPO not set in .env, prepare_update creates backup and returns changelog/download_links/rollback_info. 2) health_monitor.py refactored from 'automation' to 'observer' terminology - /api/health/detailed now returns 'observer_metrics' instead of 'automation_metrics'. 3) mDNS discovery improvements at /api/discovery/* - periodic stale cleanup, restart_discovery(), get_discovery_stats() with scan_count, stale_timeout_seconds, etc. PIN login works with 1234. Frontend System page at /admin/system and Discovery page at /admin/discovery both render correctly with all UI elements. No agents on network so discovery shows empty state.
